use_cases: Triggering primary actions in forms and dialogs across web applications
Creating variant-styled buttons for different UI contexts like destructive or secondary actions
Using asChild prop for composing buttons with custom components like links or other elements
Implementing accessible icon-only buttons with proper focus states
Building consistent button interfaces with disabled states across design systems
ai_summary: A flexible, accessible button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, with proper focus-visible rings and disabled states. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and composes seamlessly with custom elements via the asChild prop.
